title: Assertion fault on valid FTS4 query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE x (y NVARCHAR(255), z NVARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO x (y, z) VALUES('aaa bbb ccc ddd', 'bbb ddd aaa ccc');
CREATE TABLE y (a NVARCHAR(255), b NVARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO y (a, b) VALUES('aaa', NULL), ('bbb', 'ccc');
SELECT * FROM x WHERE CONTAINS(y, 'bbb NEAR/6 aaa');
key_bug_features: SELECT with MATCH using FTS4 prefix option
